§6Ferric Schrabidate§f is processed §bSchrabidium§f for advanced recipes.

§eObtaining:§f
• Processing Schrabidium
• Chemical conversion

§eUses:§f
• §bDineutronium§f production (8 Ferric Schrabidate + Sparkticle = 8 DNT)
• Advanced end-game crafting
• DFC components

§c§4RADIATION:§f Highly radioactive - full hazmat protection required.

§aTip:§f Essential intermediate for the DNT path.
